mapper.sql: response_code, message_code, result_type, module_id, response_group, sequence_no, http_status, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM cpf_response_code WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY response_code

SELECT
FROM cpf_response_code WHERE response_code = #{responseCode} AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cpf_response_code ( response_code, message_code, result_type, module_id, response_group, sequence_no, http_status, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{responseCode}, #{messageCode}, #{resultType}, #{moduleId}, #{responseGroup}, #{sequenceNo}, #{httpStatus}, #{description}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW(), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE cpf_response_code SET response_code = #{request.responseCode}, message_code = #{request.messageCode}, result_type = #{request.resultType}, module_id = #{request.moduleId}, response_group = #{request.responseGroup}, sequence_no = #{request.sequenceNo}, http_status = #{request.httpStatus}, description = #{request.description}, use_yn = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.useYn}, ''), 'Y'), updated_by = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE response_code = #{responseCode}
